narrative_beat: Wide de cidade P&B com céu carmesim e anjo medieval em primeiro plano

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a wide panoramic establishing shot of a modern desaturated cityscape with silhouettes of antennas and transmission towers against an exploding crimson-gold sky with descending ash particles
subject.focal_point: the medieval angel in foreground with open wings facing the sky
subject.secondary: A medieval angel with detailed crimson-ochre-gold wings hovers in the foreground, back to the viewer.
props: medieval angel with open wings in rich colors
silhouettes of antennas and transmission towers

composition.foreground: medieval angel in rich crimson, ochre and gold
composition.midground: middle distance with antennas and drifting ash
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white modern city skyline with crimson-gold sky

lighting.fill_light: faint gold backlight on angel wings

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: divine witness over fallen modern city

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
